info.name: CuraMatrix HSM - Multi-Tenant SaaS
info.description: Complete API collection for CuraMatrix Hospital Management System

body.raw:
{
  "appointmentId": {{appointmentId}},
  "chiefComplaint": "Chest pain and shortness of breath",
  "symptoms": "Chest tightness, mild fever, fatigue",
  "diagnosis": "Acute Bronchitis",
  "notes": "Patient advised rest and medication",
  "severity": "MODERATE",
  "followUpDate": "2026-03-27"
}

{
  "appointmentId": {{appointmentId}},
  "chiefComplaint": "Chest pain",
  "symptoms": "Chest tightness, fever",
  "diagnosis": "Acute Bronchitis - Updated",
  "notes": "Patient improving",
  "severity": "MILD",
  "followUpDate": "2026-04-03"
}

item.name: 🔐 Access Control (Page-Based)
item.description: Simplified page-based access control: /api/admin/access/** and /api/me/access. No permissions layer — just pages assigned to roles and users.

exec: pm.test('Returns array of page keys', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: Scenario - Admin Can Access RBAC APIs

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('token', r.token); pm.environment.set('targetUserId', r.userId); }

item.name: Scenario - Doctor Forbidden on Admin Access (403)

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const r = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('token', r.token); }

item.name: 🧾 Receptionist Workflows
item.description: Receptionist-focused collection: login, patient registration, appointment booking, billing basics, and access checks.

exec: if (r.token) { pm.environment.set('token', r.token); pm.environment.set('userId', r.userId); pm.environment.set('userRole', r.role); }
pm.test('Receptionist gets 403 on admin access APIs', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(403); });
